text.title: Ai Pm Tool Integration Recipes — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the PM have tracker API + comms webhook + transcript API + Claude key, and scripting access?

branch.when: tracker_api == true AND comms_webhook == true AND transcript_api == true AND claude_key == true AND scripting_access == true
branch.conclusion: Pick the recipe whose inputs you already have; ship it within one sprint with the canonical prompt + schema.
Block. Establish API + key access first; recipes assume them.
Skip. Use a no-code AI platform variant instead (see `ai-powered-pm-tools`).
